testcase.name: test_ssn_detection

failure.message:
AssertionError: assert '123-45-6789' not in 'My SSN is 123-45-6789'
'123-45-6789' is contained here: My SSN is 123-45-6789

testcase.failure: test_phi_deidentifier.py:19: in test_ssn_detection assert "123-45-6789" not in masked E AssertionError: assert '123-45-6789' not in 'My SSN is 123-45-6789' E E '123-45-6789' is contained here: E My SSN is 123-45-6789

testcase.name: test_multiple_phi_types
testcase.failure: test_phi_deidentifier.py:52: in test_multiple_phi_types assert "123-45-6789" not in masked E assert '123-45-6789' not in "I'm [PERSON...one 555-1234" E E '123-45-6789' is contained here: E I'm [PERSON_2], SSN 123-45-6789, phone 555-1234 E ? +++++++++++

testcase.name: test_session_isolation
testcase.failure: test_phi_deidentifier.py:91: in test_session_isolation assert len(map1) > 0 E assert 0 > 0 E + where 0 = len({})

testcase.name: test_no_phi_unchanged

failure.message:
AssertionError: assert (6 == 0 or 'I am feeling better today' == 'I am feeling...[DATE_TIME_2]' + where 6 = len({'[PHONE_NUMBER_1]': '555-123-4567', '[EMAIL_ADDRESS_1]': 'patient@example.com', '[PERSON_1]': 'Email', '[DATE_TIME_1]': '12/25/2024', ...})
#x1B[0m#x1B[91m- I am feeling better [DATE_TIME_2]#x1B[39;49;00m#x1B[90m#x1B[39;49;00m #x1B[92m+ I am feeling better today#x1B[39;49;00m#x1B[90m#x1B[39;49;00m)

testcase.failure: test_phi_deidentifier.py:127: in test_no_phi_unchanged assert len(mapping) == 0 or text == masked E AssertionError: assert (6 == 0 or 'I am feeling better today' == 'I am feeling...[DATE_TIME_2]' E + where 6 = len({'[PHONE_NUMBER_1]': '555-123-4567', '[EMAIL_ADDRESS_1]': 'patient@example.com', '[PERSON_1]': 'Email', '[DATE_TIME_1]': '12/25/2024', ...}) E E #x1B[0m#x1B[91m- I am feeling better [DATE_TIME_2]#x1B[39;49;00m#x1B[90m#x1B[39;49;00m E #x1B[92m+ I am feeling better today#x1B[39;49;00m#x1B[90m#x1B[39;49;00m)
